code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if is_ws
        if start >= 0
          match string.parse_int(string.substring(s, start, i))
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          start = -1
        end
      else
        if start < 0
          start = i
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    match string.parse_int(string.substring(s, start, n))
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn take_k_desc(_ xs: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut limit = k
  if limit > n
    limit = n
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  while count < limit
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if not list.contains(used, j)
        match xs.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          if best_idx < 0 or v > best_val
            best_idx = j
            best_val = v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    used = list.push(used, best_idx)
    result = list.push(result, best_val)
    count = count + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let numbers = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let sorted = take_k_desc(numbers, k)

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let sn = sorted.len()
while idx < sn
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
